commentaries.author: Cyril of Alexandria
commentaries.content: remnant of Joseph: Once again he refers to Ephraim, or the 10 tribes; as I said before, since Ephraim was a son of Joseph, he consequently refers to him also by his father’s name.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
May be. God will not be wanting on his side. But this implies that man may find a difficulty in seeking good, and neglect to do it, though he may if he please, with God's assistance. (Worthington)
Remnant. Posterity. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Gregory The Dialogist
commentaries.content: and establish justice in the gate: It was the old custom that the elders should sit at the gate to make out by judicial trial the quarrels of persons at strife, in order that they should never enter the city at variance and should dwell there in harmo­ny.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
